MID_TIER_LOW (0) → Low
  MID_TIER_MID (1) → Mid
  MID_TIER_HIGH (2) → High

tests.name: tests::tests::level_as_str_returns_fixed_width_labels

Trace.as_str() = "TRACE"  (len=5)
  Info.as_str() = "INFO "  (len=5)
  Warn.as_str() = "WARN "  (len=5)
  Error.as_str() = "ERROR"  (len=5)
  Fatal.as_str() = "FATAL"  (len=5)

tests.output:
Display(Info) = "INFO "
  Display(Error) = "ERROR"
